title: nepeta nepetella var. crenata
intro: Nepeta nepetella var. crenata, also known as catmint or Nepeta, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a low-growing, spreading perennial with gray-green leaves and blue to purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Nepeta nepetella var. crenata include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta nepetella var. crenata include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for herbal preparations.
